lessons.title: Advanced Sautéing Techniques
lessons.description: Learn how to sauté vegetables and proteins to perfection, including tips on heat control and timing.
steps: Heat the pan and add oil.
Add ingredients in the correct order.
Stir frequently to ensure even cooking.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
safety_tips: Always use a pot holder when handling hot pans.

lessons.title: Basic Baking Skills
lessons.description: Understand the fundamentals of baking, including measuring ingredients and using the oven.
steps: Preheat the oven to the required temperature.
Measure dry and wet ingredients accurately.
Mix ingredients according to the recipe.
Pour batter into a prepared pan.
Bake for the specified time and check for doneness.
safety_tips: Use oven mitts when handling hot trays.
Keep the area around the oven clear of flammable materials.
